overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist Link standing in a vibrant sunlit grassland. The camera slowly orbits around the stationary character, revealing a vast open landscape with a large mountain range and distant rocky cliffs.

agents.ego_description: standing still on grassy terrain facing the large mountain range in the distance

entered.detail: tall dark mountain range dominating the background with rocky peaks
vibrant green grass covering the ground with small flowers
bright lens flare from the sun in the upper left sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of the character standing in a sunlit grassy field. A large mountain range dominates the center background under a clear blue sky with bright sun glare visible in the upper left. The camera slowly rotates to the right around the stationary character.

events.description: character rotates to face more toward the camera, transitioning from side profile to three-quarter view

agents.ego_description: standing in the field while slowly turning to face the camera as the orbit completes

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop with trees on top entering from the right side
valley opening visible between the mountain and cliff formations

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues rotating right, a large rocky cliff formation enters the view on the right side, revealing a distant valley between the mountain and cliff. The character slowly turns to face toward the camera, showing more of the front of their outfit. The mountain shifts to the left side of the frame while the grassy plains remain in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow orbital camera movement that shifts the perspective from a mountain-dominated horizon to a wider view of a rocky valley. It begins with a third-person view of the character standing in a sunlit grassy field, with a large mountain range centered under a clear blue sky and bright sun glare. As the camera rotates steadily to the right, a massive rocky cliff formation emerges on the right side of the frame, gradually revealing a distant valley nestled between the peaks. The scene then shifts as the character slowly turns to face the camera, causing the mountain to slide toward the left while the expansive grassy plains remain in the foreground.
